title: General Chipping practice
description: Unstructured block to warm up chipping mechanics and feel.

title: 8 out of 10 in a 3 foot circle from 30'
description: Mark out a 3-foot circle around a hole. Hit chips from 30 feet away, trying to land and stop them inside that circle. Keep trying until you get at least 8 out of 10 balls inside the circle.

title: Chipping compass
description: Hit 4 chips to each hole on the practice green from above, below, left, and right. If you have 4 holes, that makes 64 chips total. Score is how many finish within 3 feet of the target.

title: Par-18 chipping challenge
description: Play 9 different chipping spots (3 easy, 3 medium, 3 hard) to varying holes. Don't play the same easy spot three times. Treat each location as a par 2 (trying to get up and down in two strokes). Keep a scorecard.
